title: hypolytrum longifolium subsp. rubescens
intro: Hypolytrum longifolium subsp. rubescens is a plant species in the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as the 'Red-stemmed hypolytrum'. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hypolytrum longifolium subsp. rubescens include treating fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a diuretic and astringent. Hypolytrum longifolium subsp. rubescens is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
